suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove dependencies on `jq` and `curl` in bash snippets. Provide Node.js script fallbacks for JSON parsing, and PowerShell-compatible alternatives (`Invoke-RestMethod`) for curl, as Windows environments lack `jq` and handle `curl` aliases poorly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features documents-domain-api and navigation-domain-api failed to execute provided `jq` and `curl` instructions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update Jest specific test invocation commands to use `--testPathPatterns` instead of `--testPathPattern` for Jest v30 compatibility, and wrap args correctly for PowerShell execution.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features versions-domain-api and public-read-endpoints noted false negatives or syntax errors using the provided testing flags.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether CQRS-style read-model bypasses of the domain layer (directly injecting PrismaService into Controllers/Services for simple reads) are allowed, as `AGENTS.md` currently strictly mandates Use-Case + Either pattern for all contexts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature public-read-endpoints bypassed domain use-cases for read-only routes to save overhead.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Acknowledge that strict red-first TDD sequencing is often bypassed by workers in non-interactive mode in favor of batching implementation and testing to reduce overhead.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple features (public-read-endpoints, versions-domain-api) explicitly deviated from the TDD sequencing rules.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker documented API runtime boot issue in library.
